# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Member User Files Upload
Description: Allows logged-in users to upload profile pictures and documents. Saves files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: Your Company
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class MUF_User_Files_Upload {
    const NONCE_ACTION = 'muf_user_files_upload';
    const NONCE_NAME   = 'muf_nonce';
    const FORM_ACTION  = 'muf_upload';
    const USERMETA_PROFILE_PIC = 'muf_profile_picture';
    const USERMETA_DOCS        = 'muf_documents';

    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', [$this, 'maybe_handle_upload']);
        add_shortcode('user_files_upload', [$this, 'shortcode']);
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', [$this, 'enqueue']);
    }

    public function enqueue() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) return;
        wp_enqueue_style('muf-user-files-upload', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'muf-user-files-upload.css', [], '1.0.0');
    }

    private function uploads_base_dir() {
        $uploads = wp_upload_dir();
        return trailingslashit($uploads['basedir']) . 'user-files/';
    }

    private function uploads_base_url() {
        $uploads = wp_upload_dir();
        return trailingslashit($uploads['baseurl']) . 'user-files/';
    }

    private function ensure_dir($dir) {
        if (!file_exists($dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($dir);
        }
        if (!file_exists(trailingslashit($dir) . 'index.html')) {
            @file_put_contents(trailingslashit($dir) . 'index.html', '');
        }
    }

    private function user_dir($user_id) {
        return trailingslashit($this->uploads_base_dir()) . 'user-' . intval($user_id) . '/';
    }

    private function user_url($user_id) {
        return trailingslashit($this->uploads_base_url()) . 'user-' . intval($user_id) . '/';
    }

    private function is_allowed_extension($ext) {
        $allowed = [
            // images
            'jpg','jpeg','png','gif','webp',
            // pdf
            'pdf',
            // office
            'doc','docx','xls','xlsx','ppt','pptx',
            // text
            'txt','rtf','csv',
            // open formats
            'odt','ods','odp'
        ];
        return in_array(strtolower($ext), $allowed, true);
    }

    private function sanitize_filename_strict($filename) {
        $filename = wp_basename($filename);
        $filename = remove_accents($filename);
        $filename = preg_replace('/[^A-Za-z0-9\.\-_]+/', '-', $filename);
        $filename = preg_replace('/-+/', '-', $filename);
        $filename = trim($filename, '-');
        if ($filename === '') $filename = 'file';
        return $filename;
    }

    private function unique_filename($dir, $filename) {
        $path = $dir . $filename;
        if (!file_exists($path)) return $filename;

        $info = pathinfo($filename);
        $name = isset($info['filename']) ? $info['filename'] : 'file';
        $ext  = isset($info['extension']) ? '.' . $info['extension'] : '';
        $i = 1;
        do {
            $candidate = $name . '-' . $i . $ext;
            $i++;
        } while (file_exists($dir . $candidate));
        return $candidate;
    }

    private function add_message($type, $text) {
        if (!isset($_SESSION)) {
            if (!headers_sent()) {
                @session_start();
            }
        }
        if (!isset($_SESSION['muf_messages'])) $_SESSION['muf_messages'] = [];
        $_SESSION['muf_messages'][] = ['type' => $type, 'text' => $text];
    }

    private function get_messages() {
        if (!isset($_SESSION)) {
            if (!headers_sent()) {
                @session_start();
            }
        }
        $msgs = isset($_SESSION['muf_messages']) ? (array)$_SESSION['muf_messages'] : [];
        unset($_SESSION['muf_messages']);
        return $msgs;
    }

    public function maybe_handle_upload() {
        if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST') return;
        if (!isset($_POST['muf_action']) || $_POST['muf_action'] !== self::FORM_ACTION) return;
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            $this->add_message('error', 'You must be logged in to upload files.');
            return;
        }
        if (!isset($_POST[self::NONCE_NAME]) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST[self::NONCE_NAME], self::NONCE_ACTION)) {
            $this->add_message('error', 'Security check failed. Please try again.');
            return;
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();

        $base_dir = $this->uploads_base_dir();
        $this->ensure_dir($base_dir);

        $user_dir = $this->user_dir($user_id);
        $this->ensure_dir($user_dir);

        $did_any = false;

        // Profile picture upload
        if (isset($_FILES['muf_profile_picture']) && is_array($_FILES['muf_profile_picture'])) {
            $r = $this->handle_single_upload($_FILES['muf_profile_picture'], $user_dir, 'profile');
            if ($r['ok']) {
                update_user_meta($user_id, self::USERMETA_PROFILE_PIC, $r['relative']);
                $this->add_message('success', 'Profile picture uploaded.');
                $did_any = true;
            } elseif ($r['error'] !== '') {
                $this->add_message('error', 'Profile picture: ' . $r['error']);
            }
        }

        // Documents upload (multiple)
        if (isset($_FILES['muf_documents']) && is_array($_FILES['muf_documents'])) {
            $results = $this->handle_multiple_uploads($_FILES['muf_documents'], $user_dir, 'doc');
            $uploaded = [];
            $errors = [];

            foreach ($results as $res) {
                if ($res['ok']) $uploaded[] = $res['relative'];
                elseif ($res['error'] !== '') $errors[] = $res['error'];
            }

            if (!empty($uploaded)) {
                $existing = get_user_meta($user_id, self::USERMETA_DOCS, true);
                if (!is_array($existing)) $existing = [];
                $merged = array_values(array_unique(array_merge($existing, $uploaded)));
                update_user_meta($user_id, self::USERMETA_DOCS, $merged);
                $this->add_message('success', count($uploaded) . ' document(s) uploaded.');
                $did_any = true;
            }

            if (!empty($errors)) {
                $this->add_message('error', 'Documents: ' . implode(' | ', array_slice($errors, 0, 5)));
            }
        }

        if (!$did_any) {
            $this->add_message('error', 'No files were uploaded.');
        }

        $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect) $redirect = home_url('/');
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }

    private function handle_single_upload($file, $target_dir, $prefix) {
        $out = ['ok' => false, 'relative' => '', 'error' => ''];

        if (!isset($file['error'])) return $out;
        if ($file['error'] === UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE) return $out;

        if ($file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $out['error'] = $this->upload_error_message($file['error']);
            return $out;
        }

        if (!isset($file['tmp_name']) || !is_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'])) {
            $out['error'] = 'Invalid upload.';
            return $out;
        }

        $orig_name = isset($file['name']) ? (string)$file['name'] : 'file';
        $orig_name = $this->sanitize_filename_strict($orig_name);

        $ext = strtolower(pathinfo($orig_name, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        if ($ext === '' || !$this->is_allowed_extension($ext)) {
            $out['error'] = 'File type not allowed.';
            return $out;
        }

        $max_bytes = (int)apply_filters('muf_max_upload_bytes', 25 * 1024 * 1024);
        $size = isset($file['size']) ? (int)$file['size'] : 0;
        if ($size <= 0 || $size > $max_bytes) {
            $out['error'] = 'File is too large (max ' . size_format($max_bytes) . ').';
            return $out;
        }

        $date = gmdate('Ymd-His');
        $safe_base = pathinfo($orig_name, PATHINFO_FILENAME);
        $safe_base = $this->sanitize_filename_strict($safe_base);
        $filename = $prefix . '-' . $date . '-' . $safe_base . '.' . $ext;
        $filename = $this->unique_filename($target_dir, $filename);

        $dest = $target_dir . $filename;

        if (!@move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $dest)) {
            $out['error'] = 'Could not save uploaded file.';
            return $out;
        }

        @chmod($dest, 0644);

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $relative = 'user-' . intval($user_id) . '/' . $filename;

        $out['ok'] = true;
        $out['relative'] = $relative;
        return $out;
    }

    private function handle_multiple_uploads($files, $target_dir, $prefix) {
        $results = [];

        if (!isset($files['name']) || !is_array($files['name'])) {
            // treat as single
            $results[] = $this->handle_single_upload($files, $target_dir, $prefix);
            return $results;
        }

        $count = count($files['name']);
        for ($i = 0; $i < $count; $i++) {
            $f = [
                'name'     => $files['name'][$i] ?? '',
                'type'     => $files['type'][$i] ?? '',
                'tmp_name' => $files['tmp_name'][$i] ?? '',
                'error'    => $files['error'][$i] ?? UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE,
                'size'     => $files['size'][$i] ?? 0,
            ];
            $results[] = $this->handle_single_upload($f, $target_dir, $prefix);
        }
        return $results;
    }

    private function upload_error_message($code) {
        switch ((int)$code) {
            case UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE:
            case UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE:
                return 'File exceeds maximum allowed size.';
            case UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL:
                return 'File was only partially uploaded.';
            case UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR:
                return 'Missing temporary folder on server.';
            case UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE:
                return 'Failed to write file to disk.';
            case UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION:
                return 'A PHP extension stopped the upload.';
            default:
                return 'Upload failed.';
        }
    }

    public function shortcode($atts) {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<div class="muf-box muf-error">Please log in to upload files.</div>';
        }

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $profile_rel = (string)get_user_meta($user_id, self::USERMETA_PROFILE_PIC, true);
        $docs = get_user_meta($user_id, self::USERMETA_DOCS, true);
        if (!is_array($docs)) $docs = [];

        $msgs = $this->get_messages();
        $msg_html = '';
        foreach ($msgs as $m) {
            $cls = ($m['type'] === 'success') ? 'muf-success' : 'muf-error';
            $msg_html .= '<div class="muf-box ' . esc_attr($cls) . '">' . esc_html($m['text']) . '</div>';
        }

        $profile_url = '';
        if ($profile_rel !== '') {
            $profile_url = $this->uploads_base_url() . ltrim($profile_rel, '/');
        }

        $docs_html = '';
        if (!empty($docs)) {
            $docs_html .= '<ul class="muf-list">';
            foreach ($docs as $rel) {
                $url = $this->uploads_base_url() . ltrim((string)$rel, '/');
                $name = wp_basename((string)$rel);
                $docs_html .= '<li><a href="' . esc_url($url) . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener">' . esc_html($name) . '</a></li>';
            }
            $docs_html .= '</ul>';
        } else {
            $docs_html = '<div class="muf-muted">No documents uploaded yet.</div>';
        }

        $html = '';
        $html .= $msg_html;
        $html .= '<form class="muf-form" method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">';
        $html .= '<input type="hidden" name="muf_action" value="' . esc_attr(self::FORM_ACTION) . '">';
        $html .= wp_nonce_field(self::NONCE_ACTION, self::NONCE_NAME, true, false);

        $html .= '<div class="muf-section">';
        $html .= '<h3>Profile picture</h3>';
        if ($profile_url) {
            $html .= '<div class="muf-profile-preview"><img src="' . esc_url($profile_url) . '" alt="Profile picture" /></div>';
        } else {
            $html .= '<div class="muf-muted">No profile picture uploaded yet.</div>';
        }
        $html .= '<input type="file" name="muf_profile_picture" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.webp,.pdf,.doc,.docx,.xls,.xlsx,.ppt,.pptx,.txt,.rtf,.csv,.odt,.ods,.odp" />';
        $html .= '</div>';

        $html .= '<div class="muf-section">';
        $html .= '<h3>Documents</h3>';
        $html .= $docs_html;
        $html .= '<input type="file" name="muf_documents[]" multiple accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.webp,.pdf,.doc,.docx,.xls,.xlsx,.ppt,.pptx,.txt,.rtf,.csv,.odt,.ods,.odp" />';
        $html .= '</div>';

        $html .= '<div class="muf-section">';
        $html .= '<button type="submit">Upload</button>';
        $html .= '</div>';

        $html .= '</form>';

        return $html;
    }
}

new MUF_User_Files_Upload();

register_activation_hook(__FILE__, function() {
    $uploads = wp_upload_dir();
    $base = trailingslashit($uploads['basedir']) . 'user-files/';
    if (!file_exists($base)) {
        wp_mkdir_p($base);
    }
    if (!file_exists(trailingslashit($base) . 'index.html')) {
        @file_put_contents(trailingslashit($base) . 'index.html', '');
    }
});

if (!file_exists(__DIR__ . '/muf-user-files-upload.css')) {
    // no-op; CSS is optional
}
